arts.ttl: PSG icon slams 'annoying' Emiliano Martinez ahead of Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: Emiliano Martinez is an unpopular figure in France after mocking Kylian Mbappe with chants after Argentina's 2022 World Cup triumph and has continued to provoke fans ahead of Aston Villa's trip to PSG

arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembele, Raphinha and the two unlikely paths of Ballon d’Or favourites
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembele and Raphinha are the leading contenders for the Ballon d’Or despite taking the longer road to realising their potential

arts.ttl: Unai Emery spots Marcus Rashford's biggest change since leaving Manchester United
arts.sum: Aston Villa take on Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League quarter-finals and Marcus Rashford could play an influential role for Unai Emery's side in the French capital

arts.ttl: From France: ‘Insults, punches, flying stools’ as PSG and Aston Villa fans clash outside Moulin Rouge
arts.sum: On Tuesday, we covered reports from France which stated Paris authorities were well prepared to welcome Aston Villa supporters, and were well aware there would be a large number travelling to the city without tickets. arts.ttl: PSG's two failed Marcus Rashford moves after £75m proposal and huge contract offer
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford will come up against Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League quarter-finals with Aston Villa on Wednesday night, but the England forward could have been playing for the French side if they had their way

arts.ttl: Newcastle United official set to travel for 24-year-old – Muscling in as Aston Villa hover
arts.sum: Newcastle United and Aston Villa have their eyes set on Eyüpspor goalkeeper Berke Özer. On Tuesday, DHA reported Aston Villa are preparing to make an offer to sign him in the summer window. They also stated the Villans will continue to follow the 24-year-old, who is keen on making a switch to Villa Park.
